649:   // popstate browser navigation sync
650:   React.useEffect(() => {
651:     const handlePopState = () => {
652:       handleUrlRouting(window.location.pathname, window.location.search);
653:     };
654:     window.addEventListener('popstate', handlePopState);
655:     return () => window.removeEventListener('popstate', handlePopState);
656:   }, [handleUrlRouting]);
657: 
658:   // Direct load deep-linking on mount (also runs when dynamic database products are loaded)
659:   React.useEffect(() => {
660:     handleUrlRouting(window.location.pathname, window.location.search);
661:   }, [productsState, handleUrlRouting]);

665:   // Load published pooja products from Supabase and merge with static mock products
666:   const loadPublishedProducts = async () => {
667:     try {
668:       const { data, error } = await supabase
669:         .from('website_pooja_products')
670:         .select('*')
671:         .eq('is_published', true)
672:         .order('created_at', { ascending: false });
673: 
674:       if (error) throw error;
675:       if (data) {
676:         const mappedData: Product[] = data.map((item: any) => ({
677:           id: item.id,
678:           name: item.name,
679:           description: item.description,
680:           price: typeof item.price === 'string' ? parseFloat(item.price) : item.price,
681:           originalPrice: item.original_price ? (typeof item.original_price === 'string' ? parseFloat(item.original_price) : item.original_price) : undefined,
682:           rating: typeof item.rating === 'string' ? parseFloat(item.rating) : (item.rating || 5.0),
683:           reviewsCount: item.reviews_count || 0,
684:           image: item.image || '📿',
685:           category: item.category,
686:           inStock: item.in_stock ?? true,
687:           benefits: item.benefits || [],
688:           popularity: item.popularity || 80,
689:           spiritualType: item.spiritual_type || 'Rituals',
690:           // custom fields to keep compatibility with PoojaProduct:
691:           sanskritName: item.sanskrit_name,
692:           shortName: item.short_name,
693:           slug: item.slug,
694:           subtitle: item.subtitle,
695:           shortDescription: item.short_description,
696:           spiritualSignificance: item.spiritual_significance,
697:           material: item.material,
698:           weight: item.weight,
699:           dimensions: item.dimensions,
700:           origin: item.origin,
